prose:
**Formaldehyde frontier‐orbital gap** — DFT, **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** with density fitting (RIJK) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single point on the user‐supplied XYZ (`formaldehyde.xyz`), not re-optimized at DFT. SCF converged in 8 cycles. No warnings reported.
HOMO = −7.6523067 eV, LUMO = −1.7826355 eV → **gap = 5.8696712 eV**.

Reproducibility:
• Command:
  `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --solvent none --charge 0 --multiplicity 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpds_7czbn/live.json`
• JSON output: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpds_7czbn/live.json`
• Live log while running: `frontier_<timestamp>.out` in the current working directory (you can `tail -f frontier_<timestamp>.out`).
